no: The Calling by CamDawg. Major BG1 quest chain. INSTALL ISSUE: AUTO_TRA with variable evaluation fails via mod_installer. Components 0 and 20 fail to install automatically. Component 40 (Exotic Items) works. Manual install or PI recommended.

in.t: Components 0 and 20 fail via mod_installer (AUTO_TRA issue). Manual install or PI recommended for these components.

conflicts.reason: Both mods EXTEND_BOTTOM Thalantyr dialogue state 1 but use independent variables (SotSC: L#HIGKEQuest, Calling: CDBracerQuest). Should coexist with correct install order.
conflicts.theirComps: #0 Shades of the Sword Coast - Expansion Pack for BGEE
conflicts.source: tp2 analysis of thecalling.tp2 Beta 2+ and SotSC dialogue/thalan.d, 2026-03

conflicts.reason: Both modify Thalantyr dialogue but use compatible EXTEND_BOTTOM methods since Calling Beta 2. Install The Calling before A Job Well-Paid.
conflicts.theirComps: Of Wolves and Men -> Quest uses house in Beregost., #5
conflicts.source: tp2 analysis, The Calling Beta 2 changelog (Feb 2019) fixed Thalantyr compat, 2026-03

conflicts.reason: Both heavily modify Thalantyr dialogue and shop. Compatible with EXTEND_BOTTOM since Calling Beta 2 but install order matters. Install The Calling first.
conflicts.source: tp2 analysis, both use EXTEND_BOTTOM/APPEND on THALAN.dlg, 2026-03

conflicts.reason: Both EXTEND_BOTTOM THALAN state 1 but with independent triggers (Klatu: kla#book01, Calling: CDBracerQuest). Compatible since Calling Beta 2.
conflicts.source: tp2 analysis of both mods, independent variable namespaces, 2026-03

conflicts.reason: cdtweaks cn:1090 (Exotic Item Pack) was the same content as The Calling cn:40. cdtweaks has DEPRECATED and removed this component, so no conflict exists in current versions.
conflicts.theirComps: #1090 Exotic Item Pack (DEPRECATED, will not install)

conflicts.reason: Choose one Peaceful Werewolf Isle Resolution

sum: Major BG1 quest chain with new areas and encounters. INSTALL ISSUE: Components 0 and 20 fail via mod_installer (AUTO_TRA bug). Component 40 (Exotic Items) works. Manual install or PI recommended.

co.no: Main quest content. INSTALL ISSUE: fails via mod_installer (AUTO_TRA variable evaluation). Works with manual install or PI. Conflicts with SotSC and AC_QUEST on Thalantyr dialogue (install order matters).
Peaceful resolution for the Werewolf Isle questline. INSTALL ISSUE: same AUTO_TRA failure as cn:0. Manual install or PI recommended.
Adds exotic items to shops. Works via mod_installer (no AUTO_TRA issue). cdtweaks cn:1090 (same content) has been deprecated and removed.
